_comment: End-to-end FE-RVE workflow demo. Periodic 2D circle pack at 20% fibre fraction. Emits a gmsh .geo with every knob the FE-RVE workflow typically needs: periodic Curve directives, characteristic element size, quadratic element order, Frontal-Delaunay-for-quads algorithm, and tri->quad recombination. Run gmsh on the resulting .geo and you get a periodic quad mesh ready for an FFT or FEM homogenization solver.
